collected.policy_snippet: Our physical stores may use cameras, computer vision, sensors, and other technology to gather information about your activity in the store, such as the products and services you interact with.
collected.purpose: To provide and improve Amazon Services by analyzing user activity in physical stores.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy does not specify concrete limits on data collection, suggesting broad collection practices.

stored.policy_snippet: We automatically collect and store certain types of information about your use of Amazon Services
stored.purpose: To provide and improve Amazon Services

physical_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Physical data like video recordings from stores is collected and stored, posing risks of unauthorized access or misuse without explicit deletion policies.

collected.policy_snippet: We automatically collect and store certain types of information about your use of Amazon Services, including information about your interaction with products, content, and services available through Amazon Services.
collected.purpose: To provide and improve Amazon Services by analyzing user interactions and preferences.
collected.legal_basis: Legitimate interest in improving services and personalization.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy mentions collecting data for specific purposes but lacks concrete limits or examples of minimal data collection practices.

stored.policy_snippet: We automatically collect and store certain types of information about your use of Amazon Services, including information about your interaction with products, content, and services available through Amazon Services.
stored.purpose: To retain data for service improvement and troubleshooting.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: You can delete your voice recordings, text transcripts, and typed requests to Alexa by visiting More > Alexa Privacy in the Alexa app or https://www.amazon.com/alexaprivacysettings.

shared.policy_snippet: We share customers' personal information only as described below and with subsidiaries Amazon.com, Inc. controls that either are subject to this Privacy Notice or follow practices at least as protective as those described in this Privacy Notice.
shared.purpose: To enable third-party services, fulfill transactions, and provide joint offerings.

behavioral_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Behavioral data is collected and stored for personalization and service improvement, shared with third parties and across borders, posing risks of misuse, profiling, and data exposure without explicit user control over retention periods.
